name: Polish UI
description: Detail-oriented UI polish — spacing, hierarchy, states, and finishing passes that raise interface quality.

install.cursor: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill polish-ui -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill polish-ui -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add ibelick/ui-skills --skill polish-ui -a codex -g -y
